utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items required in the format. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding keys: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. Each item requires the type of coverage and associated costs. The plan specifies costs for health (€100/month), property (€60/month), travel (€50/month), and additional services (€100/month), and provides a total budget with monthly and annual breakdown, plus timing details. While brand names are fictitious, each required item includes a coverage description and explicit cost, and the total budget includes monthly and annual costs. Therefore, all items are present and fully specified per the format’s requirements.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four items: LifeFirst Standard Plan (health_coverage), VitalPlus Standard Coverage (property_coverage), InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel_coverage), and LifeFirst Standard Plan Professional Liability (additional_services). We must match each to the ground-truth ratings. In the provided ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan appears under primary health coverage (physical_health) with rating 9. VitalPlus Standard Coverage appears under property_protection > home_content with rating 7. InsurePlus Standard Plan appears under mobility_coverage > travel_insurance with rating 10. There is no explicit entry for 'LifeFirst Standard Plan Professional Liability' in the ground-truth dataset, so it cannot be mapped; we will omit items without a corresponding ground-truth rating as instructed to map only items present in the ratings.
